input.command:
git add website/assets/css/custom.css && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat(website): replace --ddx-color-* vars with lever/load/fulcrum token system [ddx-43118352]

- Re-derives primary hue/saturation/lightness from accent-lever #3B5B7A (HSL 210, 36%, 35%)
- Adds @import for Newsreader and Space Grotesk from Google Fonts
- Exposes --ddx-accent-lever/load/fulcrum, --ddx-bg-canvas/surface,
  --ddx-fg-ink/muted, --ddx-border-line as CSS vars
- Adds dark-mode overrides for bg/fg/border tokens

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

data.text: Commit succeeded. The CSS file now replaces the old `--ddx-color-*` variables with the lever/load/fulcrum token system: `@import` for Newsreader and Space Grotesk fonts, `--primary-hue/saturation/lightness` re-derived from `#3B5B7A`, and all required token vars (`--ddx-accent-lever/load/fulcrum`, `--ddx-bg-canvas/surface`, `--ddx-fg-ink/muted`, `--ddx-border-line`) exposed with dark-mode overrides.
